Item Details:

## sidebar-14

A sidebar on the right.

**Type:** registry:block
**Files:** 2 file(s)

visual_summary: This is a right-aligned sidebar component typically used to hold supplementary information or navigation items. It usually takes the rightmost portion of a screen and provides easy access to secondary content. A developer would use this component to create a well-structured and visually appealing layout for their application.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready block component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-14
Description: This is a right-aligned sidebar component typically used to hold supplementary information or navigation items. It usually takes the rightmost portion of a screen and provides easy access to secondary content. A developer would use this component to create a well-structured and visually appealing layout for their application.
Style: boxed, scrollable, responsive
Interactions: responsive, draggable, resizable
Tags: sidebar, block, layout

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
